features: Shower; Shave and Style - 100 Percentage Waterproof for wet or dry shaving and is fully washable for easy cleaning. Use your favourite wet-shave foams or gels or take your shaving routine into the shower
Stubble Styler Accessory - Want to create the 3-day stubble look The Stubble Styler Accessory that lets you create a shave that’s not as close for a more rugged-looking stubble style
Pop Up Comfort Trim Detailer - The F6 Style Series Aqua Foil has a Pop Up Comfort Trim Detailer designed to help neaten up your sideburns; or trim any stray hairs around your hairline
Up to 60 Minutes Cordless Use with 5 Minute Quick Charge - Its 2-Stage LED indicator will let you know when your battery is low
description: Product Description Shower, Shave and Style with the F6 Style Series Aqua Foil. Designed to be 100% Waterproof, you can streamline your shaving and shower routine with all the benefits of wet shaving. Enjoy Versatile Styling while having plenty of time to perfect your look with the 60-Minute Cordless Usage Time. Its Ergonomic Design ensures your shaver sits comfortable in your hand, offering complete shaving control. Directions 1. Ensure the shaver is fully charged. 2. (Optional) Attach the stubble styler accessory and adjust the length setting. 3. Wet the shaving area, if desired. 4. Turn on the shaver and apply shaving cream, if desired. 5. Move the shaver against the direction of hair growth. 6. Rinse the shaver under running water for easy cleaning. Safety Warning Do not use near water while charging. Be careful when using in the shower to prevent falling. See more
